summary: A clip from a WTOC local news segment. It shows family snapshots of a man, a woman, and two young children outdoors, and a later beach snapshot of the same family. A grey card with dark text presents a Department of Homeland Security statement saying the subject was released into the country under the Biden Administration, failed to appear at immigration proceedings, and received a final order of removal on April 17, 2026. The lower-third reads WIFE SEEKS JUSTICE AFTER DEADLY CRASH, EFFINGHAM COUNTY.

script.scene: A family snapshot of two adults and two children outdoors; lower-third reads WIFE SEEKS JUSTICE AFTER DEADLY CRASH.
A grey card shows a DHS statement that the subject was released, failed to appear, and got a final removal order on April 17, 2026.
A beach snapshot of the same family appears under the WTOC banner.

notable_text: WIFE SEEKS JUSTICE AFTER DEADLY CRASH; EFFINGHAM COUNTY; DEPARTMENT OF HOMELAND SECURITY; final order of removal on April 17, 2026; WTOC
